title: Mythical Weapons
body:
A weapon mod that I am working on that adds new, OP weapons in Minecraft!
You can right-click to use the special abilities, and some weapons also have a passive ability!
This is still a work in progress, and these weapons are only obtained through Creative for the time being.

Current weapons: Mjolnir, Excalibur

Curseforge page: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/st90957s-mythical-weapons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/st90957s-mythical-weapons)
